dict.string: Sekai needs camera access for photo capture automation.
Sekai needs microphone access for voice commands and audio recording.
Sekai needs speech recognition for voice transcription.
Sekai needs Automation permission to control other applications via AppleScript.
Sekai needs Screen Recording to see what is on screen so the agent can act on the current context.
Sekai needs Input Monitoring to receive global hotkeys and observe user activity outside its own windows.
